calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To Jul-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Juanita Malone in Propria Persona. Loretta Malone also present.

The Court explained that a Petition for Spousal Property is not the right vehicle to put the property into the Trust and that there is an inconsistency in the property desciription. The matter was continued to July 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Malone to look into hiring Counsel.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/ Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2013 Continued To May-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
